case.title: THOMPSON v. CITY AND STATE OF NEW YORK

opinion.h1: THOMPSON v. CITY AND STATE OF NEW YORK, 382 U.S. 24 (1965)
opinion.h4: THOMPSON v. CITY AND STATE OF NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SECOND CIRCUIT. No. 248, Misc. Decided October 11, 1965.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
